# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv preprint that introduces a benchmark and reports concrete empirical results, including task counts, evaluation dimensions, and measured performance differences across multiple reuse settings. The excerpt includes explicit benchmark outcomes such as resolution rates, patch failure counts, regression-related pass rates, and runtime framing, so it clearly meets the institute standard for real experimental substance.

## Limits
